basic_details.job_title: District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills – Record Keeper, Steno and More – 8 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills
basic_details.short_information: District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills Recruitment 2026 for 8 posts of Record Keeper, Steno and More Posts. Candidates with Bachelor's Degree with Diploma Can Apply Offline. The offline application starts on 01-06-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills official website.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18, Max: 32 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST)

qualification.education_qualification: Educational qualifications range from Bachelor's Degree with Diploma in Stenography to SSLC passed.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District & Sessions Judge West Jaintia Hills Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
